items.description: An end-to-end deep learning project demonstrating the design and deployment of neural network models for real-world applications. Covers data preprocessing, model architecture, training, and evaluation using industry-standard frameworks, highlighting practical expertise in AI, machine learning, and scalable model development.

items.name: vehicle-specific-risk-prediction
items.description: A hybrid machine learning framework for vehicle-specific accident risk prediction, combining historical and real-time environmental data to generate intelligent alerts for safer navigation in mountainous and high-risk road conditions.

items.name: ML-Framework_Checker
items.description: ML Framework and CUDA Checker is a Python-based GUI application for checking PyTorch, TensorFlow, and CUDA installations. It provides detailed system specs, compatibility checks, advanced GPU management, and offers options to view instructions, export logs, and update machine learning frameworks.

items.name: Class-Level-Unlearning
items.description: Developed a class-level machine unlearning framework to selectively remove the influence of specific class data from trained machine learning models while preserving overall model performance, with applications in privacy, compliance, and adaptive AI systems.

items.name: End-to-End-Predictive-Netflix-Analytics-Framework

items.name: An-Integrated-Data-Engineering-and-Data-Science-Framework-for-Machine-Learning
items.description: Machine learning workflows involve complex steps like preprocessing, feature engineering, model selection, tuning, and deployment, which require expertise. This work presents a no-code AutoML platform built with PyCaret v3 and Streamlit that automates data ingestion, preprocessing, modeling, evaluation, and deployment.
